title: Vampiricraft
description: A Small Vampire Themed Modpack for Fabric 1.21.8
body: This Modpack is centered around the [Nycto](https://modrinth.com/mod/nycto) mod which adds vampires and vampire hunters and a few other mechanics. There are a bunch of additions mods such as [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), [Effectual](https://modrinth.com/mod/effectual), [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) and more! Just to tie everything together and create an interesting experience for the player.
